variant: what results can i expect from tretinoin? hit me with the key numbers

request.message: what results can i expect from tretinoin? hit me with the key numbers

response_body.response: you're asking for the numbers on tretinoin results. the docs are thin on specific timelines and percentages, so i'm filling this with clinical standards.  key context: tretinoin works by stimulating fibroblasts and increasing cell turnover. it's not a quick fix. most people see texture smoothing first (4–8 weeks), then deeper collagen changes (12+ weeks). pigmentation takes longer because you're waiting for melanin-loaded cells to shed. the catch: you have to actually use it consistently and not tank your barrier. over-exfoliating or stacking too many actives kills the results. spf is non-negotiable or uv will undo the pigmentation work.

products.name: Beauty of Joseon Relief Sun Rice + Probiotic SPF 50+ PA++++
products.description: Cosmetic-elegant Asian SPF — chemical filters, no white cast.
